title: Osteospermum lanosum

The health benefits of Osteospermum lanosum are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various conditions, including arthritis and skin irritations. The most common herbal preparations made from Osteospermum lanosum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.

Osteospermum lanosum is an annual or short-lived perennial plant that produces white or pink flowers.
